description: Test-split unified-HARD reconstruction benchmark. Family filter: median pairwise tree distance ≥ test-pool p50 (2.086). Held-out-leaf filter: pick the leaf maximizing min-NN tree distance among leaves with gap fraction ≥ 0.25 AND min-NN distance ≥ 1.5. Designed to stress long-branch reconstruction AND high-gap presence/absence prediction simultaneously.
